health_score.label: Health Score
health_score.description: 0–100 composite score reflecting how well a feature is documented, used, and behaving. Higher is better.
health_score.intro: Combines docs, drift, usage, and hints into one number.

health_grade.label: Health Grade
health_grade.description: Letter grade derived from health score.

values.A: score ≥ 90 — fully documented, healthy, used recently
values.D: score < 60 — poor, likely undocumented or drifting

psi.label: Population Stability Index (PSI)
psi.description: Measures distribution shift between baseline and current data. Higher PSI ⇒ more drift.
psi.intro: Industry-standard distribution shift metric used for drift detection.

drift_severity.label: Drift Severity
drift_severity.description: Severity bucket assigned to a monitoring check.

values.warning: moderate PSI drift, null spike, or range violation
values.critical: large PSI drift, multiple anomalies, or a hard failure
values.unknown: no baseline / no recent check available

completeness.label: Completeness
completeness.description: Share of non-null values in the current data window vs. the baseline. Used to detect null spikes.

quality_score.label: Quality Score
quality_score.description: Discovery-time signal of metadata richness (naming, dtype, sample stats). Drives the Discovery plugin's ranking.

monitoring_status.label: Monitoring Status
monitoring_status.description: Aggregate status across recent monitoring runs for a feature or group: healthy / warning / critical.

action_item.label: Action Item
action_item.description: Recommended action persisted in the catalog. Sources: drift_alert (auto from monitoring), chat (AI suggestion), autodoc (doc gap), manual (user-added). Status flow: pending → applied / dismissed / snoozed.
action_item.intro: How recommendations turn into trackable outcomes.
